events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Rock Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Still strutting his stuff after all these years! We're celebrating the one and only Mick Jagger, who turns 83 today. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast.

angles.name: MTV's Big Birthday
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed music forever! Remember the first video ever played? It was The Buggles with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' released
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, propelling them to Britpop stardom.

angles.name: Britpop Classic Anniversary
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped their debut album 'Definitely Maybe'. A true Britpop game-changer! What's your top track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal event in 1960s counterculture, kicked off on August 15, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, half a million people gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. An unforgettable moment in music history.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who died on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: 49 years today since we lost the one and only Elvis Presley. His music and legacy continue to inspire generations.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true punk-rock pioneer and legend of The Pretenders.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: Mad Fer It! Liam's Birthday
angles.copy: The one and only Liam Gallagher is 54 today! Still bringing the rock and roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' UK single release
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK on this day in 1975, four years after its initial US release.

angles.name: Imagine's UK Single Day
angles.copy: 49 years ago, John Lennon's timeless message of peace, 'Imagine', was released as a single here in the UK. A song that still resonates globally.

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Grab your martini, shaken not stirred! It's James Bond Day, celebrating 64 years since 'Dr. No' hit cinemas. Who's your favourite Bond?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the legendary John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're remembering the profound impact and enduring legacy of John Lennon.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true British comedy icon.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' released
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, famously known as 'The White Album', was released on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: It's 58 years since The Beatles dropped their sprawling, iconic 'White Album'. Which track is your hidden gem from this masterpiece?
